creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Created attachment 258285
0001-bl-a-o-cklistd-add-runtime-U-option-to-mark-BL_BADUS.patch

Perhaps some people will prefer this approach, it's the patch extending the daemon with -U option to count BL_BADUSER. It was submitted as https://github.com/zoulasc/blocklist/pull/17 but a different solution was proposed in the upstream.
